texto: At times there will be fire
autor: this we can't avoid. But it's up to us to decide whether it will consume or it will purify.
explicacao: Citação de this we can't avoid. But it's up to us to decide whether it will consume or it will purify. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “At times there will be fire” articula reflexao, cristen-rodgers, times em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
